summary: First test run for AvirLog MVP. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases pass — auth (register/login/me/duplicate/401), logs CRUD with date and range filters, /logs/dates aggregation, user-scoping (B can't patch/delete A's log), settings GET/PUT (autocreate + persist), /export shape, DELETE /api/auth/account fully wipes user. Frontend (Expo web preview, 390x844 mobile viewport): landing renders, sign-in with tester@avirlog.com lands on /(tabs)/log, fresh email sign-up also lands on Quick Log. Quick Log Left button -> toast 'Logged · Left' + Skip closes sheet. Right button -> sheet opens, tags Work+Trading + note + Save -> toast 'Context added'. Today tab shows today-summary-card with content. Insights tab shows dominance chart + time-of-day card + patterns-locked card. History shows today's date row, opening it lists logs; Edit changes state and saves -> toast 'Log updated'; Delete -> confirm sheet -> toast 'Log deleted'. Settings: dark mode toggle works, reminders switch reveals interval pills (interval-120 persisted via PUT /api/settings), sign-out returns to landing. 'Continue with Google' button is rendered (Google OAuth flow intentionally not exercised end-to-end). No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch) used. No SafeAreaView or red-screen issues observed. Only minor react-native-web console deprecation warnings ('shadow*' style props, props.pointerEvents) — these come from internal RN components, no app-level fix required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 411-line file — acceptable for MVP, but if more features are added, consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/logs.py, routers/settings.py.
POST /api/logs returns 200; consider 201 Created for stricter REST semantics (non-blocking).

user_sessions.expires_at is stored as ISO string but compared as datetime in get_current_user — currently works because of the fromisoformat branch, but storing as native UTC datetime would be cleaner.
DELETE /api/auth/account does not invalidate any outstanding JWT (cannot, by design of stateless JWT). Acceptable since the user record is gone and /auth/me will 401, which testing confirmed.
seed_data_creation: Tester account tester@avirlog.com / breathe123 ensured (idempotent register). Several breath_logs were created for today during UI tests; one was deleted via the History delete flow. Settings briefly toggled to dark/120-min reminder by UI test and then sign-out occurred; tester remains with whatever final settings the UI left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_avirlog_backend.py and is fully reusable: run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Base URL is read from /app/frontend/.env (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). All flows in the original spec were exercised (auth, logs CRUD + scoping, settings, export, account delete, UI Quick Log/Today/Insights/History/Settings). Google OAuth is intentionally not e2e-tested; only the button presence is verified.
